title: FROGGYS GUI
body:
Over the past months, I made this GUI texture pack and it's finally done. Every GUI has its own pixel art, and I made a video about each one on [my Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@its_Froggy_mc) Maybe check it out!
(Disclaimer: it's in German)

cit:

there are 3 cit hats u need the mod [cit-resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) to see them name a carved pumpkin:

Glasses -for glasses

Frog_hat -for frog hat

Hat -for hat obviosly



ik theres some textures missing in the pack but i keep updating it so stay tuned

Showcase video:
